title: ophrys × benacensis var. aurelia
intro: Ophrys × benacensis var. aurelia, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species derived from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys bombyliflora. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Ophrys × benacensis var. aurelia include its ability to boost the immune system and aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
